title: Moonstone in the Sunshine
content:
Should I blame you for breaking my heart?
Or should I thank you for the world of hurt?
My God you were beautiful, and you still are beautiful
Even if you broke me without a shred of mercy
In the entire world you are still the most graceful
Even if you left my life all tipsy
You did it gently and slowly
But you sure did it honestly
Maybe to you I never mattered
But you were to me more than can be uttered
It was a short but effective flare
But it ended in more than my heart could bear
You were such a beauty
I would gladly make making you happy my duty
Sadly you were never mine
You were my moonstone in the sunshine.

title: Dust and Crisis
content:
Dust, dust, dust and more dust
The crushing and screaming of my past
All crushing on my shoulders
Crushing my heart with enormous boulders
Crisis, crisis and even more crisis
Is all that there is
No hidden truths or lies
Just the collapsing of my wailing skies
It seems my limit is my shoulder
Reducing on each day as I get older
The past seems to be too far
Yet I can see the best in my future
I'm battling inner wars that no one understands
Wars that I fight by my own hands
Whirlwinds churning inside
Whirlpools dotting from the horizon to my side
Though I'm here with the comfort of everyone
I'm here lonely and alone with no one.

title: They Know Nothing
content:
They see nothing
Yet they watch everything
They can't hear anything
Yet they know everything
They claim they can hold a star
Yet they can't reach even their own fur
They are everywhere
Yet they are really nowhere
They are lonely and alone
Yet they know everyone who was born
They love their silence
Yet they speak about everything's presence
They speak and say everything
Yet they know nothing
Even though they know us to our inner selves
They know little about themselves.

title: The Golden Shoe
content:
Your eyes said it all
My falling in love had been the wrong fall
No, I fell and was caught by no one
My fall was met by a punch, a really big one
Not much I could do to stop you
You were the golden shoe, I was the rusty shoe
I should have listened to "her"
Even though she seemed distant and far
She was simple real and honest
And she helped me clear you from my chest
Even though she is not as beautiful
She always kept my life alive and peaceful
Even though she is not endowed in your every aspect
She is to me nothing short of perfect
You may be my miss world
But you are nothing I would dream to hold
You have beauty and brains
But you won't have me in chains
You knew you were my sun
Yet you let me crush and burn
Burn to my very last of ashes
Burning me with sparks and flashes
She picked me up
She let my tears roll on her lap
She gave me heaven on earth
She once again made me appreciate my birth
She stitched together my broken parts
She did it with the greatest of her arts
She did it with plenty of love
An emotion you will never have
She gave me a reason to be alive
She pushed me to survive
And survive I did
Coating love on every deed
She is like an eternal flower
A flower that glows more beautiful with each hour
She is truly an angel
Because for love she did it all
Even though she knew my heart belonged to another
The other to whom I was no more than a bother
She was everything you never were
For this reason my admiration grew for her
Grew because it wasn't there
Like a blinding fire grown from a flare
I came to appreciate her as a person
Compared to her, you were self-arson
I wonder why anything for you had developed
She gave my heart all it sang and hoped
She gave me bright light
Bright enough to restore my sight
My queen was never a mile away
She was staring at me everyday
Loving me more and hurting each day
As I ran for honey on a poisonous tray
Hoping I would turn back
Cursing fate for her bad luck
Thank you for breaking me that much
Now I can only love her that much
Now I can stare in her eyes and see my sky
Now I can admit I was foolish for admitting your every lie
Now I can appreciate her inner beauty and grace
Now I can see the calm outlines of her face
Now I can appreciate the beauty of her voice
I have come to realize you were a tragic choice
You were worse than hell
Hell that broke my loving shell
The shell that she glued together piece by piece
With her round brown that glowed with peace
She held the sky for me
Held it so that I could see
And now I realize I saw more than the light
I saw the beauty of all the stars of the night
I saw hope in her eyes
I saw beauty based on no lies
Beauty that glowed from within
Beauty that would make angels grin
I saw what no one could hold
The purity of imperial gold
Rescuing me from your fire and stake
Promised myself an eternal pledge for her sake
You were right that what we have isn't love
What we feel is only meant for a few hearts to have
It was not her beauty that earned it
It was simply a mutual feeling that grew it
What you call ours went bad
Am not sure love is what the two of us had
I no longer indulge in a losing fight
Especially one that leads me further into the night
You my dear had more darkness than any night could hold
Your love was a destroying spike that is ice-cold
There is nothing left burning for us in me
It seems we were never to be
I was strong, very strong
That is why I kept you for that long
Yet you belonged to someone else
And you didn't deny it even in my face
Yet I still held on with hope
Suspending my future on your unsteady rope
Then I finally read all in your eyes
Way long before you crushed my skies
Then your mouth gave the crushing words
And they destroyed all my planets and worlds
My heart could not hold it
So I broke at your cold feet
There was no emotion in your eyes
I realized I had fell for the world's greatest lies
Now you want us back together
You truly change like the weather
It is too late to remember
Of the thing in which I used to be a member
It seems I have now gotten better
Just because I have met someone greater
Even if I still loved you
I would never involve myself with someone who made me a shoe
What we had was no more than a one-sided affair
In which I received every bad share
You were beautiful and still are
But your words now are nothing less than a purr
I don't blame you for wasting my time
I blame myself for being part of that crime
Am not sure I can look into your eyes anymore
I will see all I forgot and do not wish to know
I can't bear to hold you any longer
That won't make me any stronger
Don't bother promising me anything
Because your words no longer make my heart sing
There is a time I wanted those words
But you instead gave me words to crush my worlds
You said your prince charming had come after the long wait
You said you were grateful to God who controlled your fate
And just like the wind, you were gone
And just like that you left me broken and torn
And you still expect me to choose you over her
She truly has outdone you by far
I think you should run back to your charming
I thought your soul had waited for his coming
You were the first to make me shed my tears
The first who realized all my fears
Yet you expect me to make you my first choice
Just because you charm speak in your sweet voice
Those words were a blow if not a mighty whack
You said you were never coming back
You spoke so highly of him
You said you were a great team
Then you realized you were not his only princess
You had gotten your good looks in a muddy mess
He didn't give you even a speck of emotion
I guess that was life giving you your own portion
He said the words straight into your eyes
Seems you don't really enjoy being in my place
So you ran back to where you could find comfort
Sorry but am now someone else's fort
Someone who built on the ruins you had made
Someone who made every feeling of defeat fade
A person who understands what love is
A person whose character overflows with peace
An angel on earth
Blessed with all that is good from birth
She is the queen of her own realm
And you wear nothing but a disguising helm
And still you expect me to choose you in my lifetime
Not in this time, not in this lifetime
Not because you are not likable
It is because you are nothing but disasters and trouble.

title: Beautiful and Caged
content:
So beautiful
So powerful
Yet the story is the same on every page
Locked in her own protective cage
Afraid of stepping on new grounds
Afraid of all the world's evil hounds
Life filled with inner worry
Fear of changing the story
Brave yet so shy
Always afraid of that extra eye
The eye that tells all it sees
The eyes that deprive her of inner peace
Chained to her own world
Fearing that everything might run wild
Unsure of the future and the past
Unsure of who to really trust
Inner worries threaten to get her torn
Sadly she prefers suffering all alone.

title: Rivers of the Past
content:
Rivers are flowing fast
Carrying the water in and out of the past
Weaving the past back to me
The past I no longer wish to see
The past that has been dead for years
The past that glows with all my fears
Building bridges to the past that I had broken
Bridges to the past that I had long forgotten
All running back to me again
Running back with all the darkness and pain
Time seems like one big flashback
Like a music player repeating the same track
Repeating the saddest and most painful song
A song that pulls me further from the strong
A song that rings through my ears
A song that wells my eyes with tears
A familiar picture to my sight
A picture I have tried to forget with all my might
And yet here it stands
Struggling from my memory with its wicked hands
Memories that cover my heart with frost
Memories of all those I have lost
Memories of those who were once mine
Memories of those who were my sunshine
They are close enough to hold
Yet holding the wind is impossible I'm told
They are gone forever in the tides and waves
All am left with for memories is their graves
Is their resting place after a lifetime's toil
My eternal memories covered by the soil.

title: Labor of His Hands
content:
Once wrangled by poverty's strands
Now eats the labor of his hands
After years of searching and lacking
After years of bruising and aching
Here stands the prime of his time
A person who has tasted pepper and lime
A person who knows the pain of an empty stomach
A person who has travelled through every fissure and crack
A person who has felt the pain of physical and emotional strain
A person who mental torture didn't drive insane
A person who now stands as a beacon of hope
A person who has made every hill seem like a slope
And today am speaking to that great person
A person everyone would want for a son.

title: Paper Tigers
content:
You may have thousands of friends on each side
Yet feel so lonely inside
You may have everything there is to have
Yet never find true and earnest love
You may have an ocean of knowledge
Yet lack words to court a girl into marriage
Society may see you as the happiest in life
Yet emotions stab you constantly like a knife
Society looks up to a few who appear like ligers
Yet inside they are nothing but paper tigers
True, many things are beautiful
But they may be an illusion or deceitful
Life in its fairness is unfair
All we can do is just live or flare.

title: Dawn Was Coming
content:
Dawn was coming
I could hear hope humming
The stars were fading
My life was upgrading
To the sun which I could reach
Like a shiny shell on the beach
The stars were just too distant
Too distant for me to hunt
After searching all night
Here I emerge in the growing light
I can finally smell it
I can now give rest to my feet
The stars are clearing for the sun
The sun that is bound to give me fun
The stars were all an illusion
Crazy crushes that were just confusion
Now I can feel what it feels like to have
Now I can rest with what I deserve
The glow in those beautiful eyes
The mouth that tells no lies
The eyes that know not tears
The comfort of listening ears
Something I can call my own
Something I should have long grown.

title: I Am Tired
content:
Am tired
Tired of losing everything I ever admired
Tired of holding on to nothing but memories
Tired of watching people rest in peace
My life seems to be a recipe for sadness
And still I have hope for happiness
Each time my life acquires a new star
My heart prepares to bear a new scar
Am tired of all those silent ceremonies
Ceremonies that remind the person is "was" not "is"
Ceremonies meant to prove the existence of heaven
A resting place for all those who have fallen
Am tired of looking at all those wooden boxes
Boxes that bear both sheep and foxes
Am tired of it all
Am tired of watching another heartbeat fail and fall
Am tired of sitting on a funeral seat
I am tired of all of it.

title: Wings to Fly
content:
I wish I could give you wings to fly
I wish I could never make you cry
I wish I was like the tear of your eye
At least I would be with you before I die.
I wish I was a bee
I would follow you to every flower you see
I would sit on its base
And admire your beautiful face.
I wish I was your shoe
To prevent the ground from hurting you
Forever close to your heart as your feet
It gives me the pride of one on a golden seat.
Your love seed has sunk deep down
I will never let this love drown
Forever I will be your slave
Until I finally rest in my grave.

title: Faithful as a Dove
content:
The sparkle of your beautiful smile
Could call me from a mile
The kindness in your voice
You are one and only choice.
For your love and kindness
And for your beauty and fineness
You'll always have my heart's love
I promise to be more faithful than a dove.
Your love is like a river
Burning through me like a fever
Making my heavy voice quiver
For your love causes me to shiver.
Your beauty was my bait
Your love was my fate
Like a cake that grows into a lake
My love for you is like a cake.

title: From the First Time
content:
From the first time I saw you
I immediately fell for you
From the first time I saw a smile on you
My heart became sealed by you
From the first time I touched you
I fell in love with the scent from you
From the first time I had you
My ears have always tuned to you
From the first time I hugged you
My soul grew a longing for you
Ever since I loved you
My heart skips a beat when they name you
Ever since my heart was bound to you
My heart has always walked with you
Every time I confess my love for you
I'm assured I still want my forever along with you
To never bring tears to you
I promise never to say goodbye to you.

title: So Strident, So Silent
content:
I have never met someone so strident
Someone so wise yet so silent
With a tongue that is fluent and eloquent
A person with such a sweet scent
A person who is so confident
A person who shields me like a tent
Whose character is not curved or bent
A person who was everywhere I went.
My eyes never met another so beautiful
With a heart that was so merciful
A person who was always so careful
A person who was so emotionally powerful
A person who has been so helpful
The only one that I met who was thankful
A person who was flawless and graceful
She makes my heart feel so full.

title: My Heart Beats Only for You
content:
I always knew that I loved you
But time separated me from you
And I died being away from you
My arms longed to touch you
I would have given anything to be with you
My life seemed to have gone with you
My heart left me to follow you
I decided to forget you
But my mind was all but memories of you
I was sure a part of me had left with you
The part returned when life reunited me and you
My heart now beats only for you
I would gladly give my life for you
Because my heart will live and die with you
Am sure I want to spend forever with you
So that my heart can burn for you
Because I'll always miss being with you
How I long to walk the aisle with you!

title: The Only Thing
content:
The only thing I longed to find
The only thing that never left me behind
The only thing that is always on my mind
The only thing that kept me alive
The only thing that protected me from every beehive
The only thing that has always been on my side
The only thing that protects my sinful hide
The only thing that I don't regret
The only thing that knows my every secret
The only thing that gives me love instead of hate
The only thing I wish never to forget
The only thing that keeps me going
The only thing that keeps my character growing
The only thing that comforts me when I weep
The only thing in my dreams when I sleep
The only thing that gave me love for free
The only thing that my eyes always see
The only thing that I would gladly favor
I want to have it even after forever.

title: A Thousand Years
content:
Am sure I'll love you for a thousand years
Because you blew away my fears
And wiped away my tears
Made me a hero among my peers
Honey, please never be afraid
I mean all that I have ever said.
I would die without seeing you
Am sure love would always pull me to you
You are lively like an ever green leaf
There to comfort me through every grief
It is like dying every single day
I feel so much grief that my words can't say.
I'm not sure what to say to you
To be sure that I am the only one for you
I would give the world to keep you
I would die a thousand times without you
I promise I'll always be there for you
This is my solemn vow to you.

title: In Richness and in Wealth
content:
You promised me in sickness and in health
But you meant in richness and in wealth
I was so joyous to hear the words
Your music just took me to the clouds
I should have known you would leave me for the world
You left me with all my emotions running wild.
I knew I was marrying an angel from heaven
Didn't realize she had had and dumped seven
A female sweeter than any physical wealth
But bitter than the even dreaded death
You are like a flower that has been grown
A flower filled with every spiky thorn.
You promised me everyday
But you never mean anything you say
When I fell from the rich
You disconnected me from your love like a switch
I believe you are a prostitute of emotions
Love for money is one of your wicked notions.

title: Betrayed with My Best Friend
content:
I trusted you with my life
And you promised to be my wife
But what did you do in the end
You betrayed me with my best friend.
You both made a fool out of me
Should have told me my love was never meant to be
But you let me sheepishly fall in love
I fell in love with what I was never meant to have.
You watched me drown in tears
As I came to shame before my peers
Am not sure I can ever get into another fling
You utterly destroyed my loving being.
You were the source of my dreams
But now you are all my nightmare screams
I thought I had finally seen the light
You should've told me I was in the wrong fight.

title: Angelic Love
content:
Your eyes convey one who is confident
Your sweet voice conveys one who is strident
Your voice is like a melodious song
The song I would hear forever long.
God made you with angelic love
For you are perfect to every single curve
Your eyes sparkle more than imperial gold
Your beauty shall live to be told.
Your lips I would love to kiss
Feel your breath over me like a hiss
To feel the comfort of your arms so soft
All I need is a minute of your comfort.
The simple beauty of your face
Is truly my strength's base
Your love is stronger than horses
Truly love is the strongest earthly force.

title: Not in This Lifetime
content:
No matter how many times you cry
You will never retrieve that lie
You acted as if love was sold
Unbothered by the lies you told.
I was your committed slave
Everything you needed I gave
But still you left me for wealth
I wonder what happened to "till death".
Why should I give you my trust?
How will I know it is not just lust?
If you didn't love my poor version then
You can't love me when money is my mane.
I'm sorry but I am taken
By the one who repaired all you had broken
The angel from whom all my sorrows fled
The girl who resurrected me from the dead.
I thank you for the tears I shed
For with them your memories fled.

title: Golden Wings
content:
You made me feel like the emperor of a million kings
You gave me strong and mighty golden wings
Gave me a sign of hope for a better tomorrow
One filled of happiness and no sorrow
You made me feel like one of tender age
My heart was literally pumped out of its cage.
You were with me every single mile
Giving me the all loving, passionate smile
How would I know you would tear me to my very strands?
With the same all loving and caring hands
Tore me up with vigorous action
You came to hate me with the same loving passion.
I gave you all my heart
And you promised never to get it hurt
But the words may have been washed away by a flash flood
Because you turned to an animal from a love bird
You made me fall to my face
You pushed me thoroughly from your heart's space.
You knocked me off my feet
As I struggled to return to your love's heat
You gave me a wreck of a life
Your words sliced my heart like a knife
Wherever you promised "forever"
I should have known you meant never ever.

title: Her Body, Her Voice
content:
She is such a beautiful slut
Coded so by her frequency to flirt
She loves men and twerking her butt
And she owns an ever-starved sex craving heart
Just for the pleasure of her hip's heat
She will let every man sweep her off her feet.
When it comes to partying and sex
She is the undisputed rex
She lures men with her bottom's cakes
Getting sex at all it takes
And like a plant attacked by an army of pests
She lets any man touch her chest.
For men, she strips nude
And satisfies them with pleasure rather than food
She says she was born to work like wine
To make men feel high and fine
She believes her body is her strongest voice
It can always make men make the right choice.

title: One Last Chance
content:
I wish I could get you back
Back to my loving emotional sack
When I still knew you loved me
When you were where I would be
When I still occupied your heart
Believe me, am sorry for getting you hurt.
I know I have hurt you more than once
But please give me this one last chance
I know you have cried a lake
But forgive me for this one last mistake
I just want to be in your loving arms again
I want to help heal all that pain.
I know I treated you like a shoe
But now I regret ever hurting you
I would give anything to restore you in my life
Even curving out my heart with a knife
Please forgive me if you please
I know I broke your heart piece by piece.

title: Internal Gold
content:
I don't want something used by every local
Someone who is confident and vocal
Someone who knows why they are female
Not a toy for every hungry male
One who will love me for all I have
A person I can truly love.
I want one who knows love as a game
Someone who is not corrupted by fame
Someone in whom I can believe in and trust
Someone who will not lead me to lust
I want a person to hold
I want a person full of internal gold.
I want one with beautiful round eyes
With the beauty that attracts the flower loving butterflies
The one whose kiss is sweeter than Canaanite milk
A person whose hair is softer than Egyptian silk
With a character stronger than any metal rod
A true beauty curved personally by God.

title: God's Master Sculpture
content:
The apple of my eye
That makes all my tears dry
Beautiful, bold and strong
Her voice is the sweetest song
Oh her body!
Curved out like no other body
The chest where her heart sleeps
It is nothing that can be uttered by my lips
Her smile could win over the moon
Her heart is where every flower blooms
Where no sorrow ever looms
Her existence is a beacon of hope
With soft skin that must be washed by angelic soap
She is truly God's master sculpture
Her goodness would make every man's heart rapture
My heart dashes to space every time I see her
The sad truth is that I will never get her.

title: The Moon as My Witness
content:
The moon and the sky stand to be my witness
As I stand to proclaim your loveliness
To give my heart to her forever
To promise that I'll be there for her forever
To speak directly from my heart
To tell her I'll never get her hurt
To assure her that she will always be the one
Even if the moon becomes the sun
To tell her she is all my heart desires
To assure her she is all my heart admires
Because even the stars cannot be as her face
Even a peacock would lack such wonderful grace
Her character is simply flawless
With her everlasting faithfulness
Her eyes are simply the stars
But her character is tougher than the Roman Mars
Her beauty, love and kindness exceeds every creature
That is why I love her to every feature.

title: I Miss Everything
content:
I miss everything
Your sweet scent
Your lovely smile
Your beautiful voice
Your sparkling brown eyes
Your warm hugs
Your ever-tranquilizing nature
The comfort of your trust
Your curved body
Your kind heart
Your lovable character
Your self-consciousness
Your general loving smile
The joy of hearing you laugh
The comfort of you being there
Even when you are miles away
I hope we will meet someday
Maybe one day.

title: Growing Sick Without You
content:
With each passing week
I grow more and more sick
Sick because I can't see your face
Not watching you walk in flawless grace
Sick of not being able to stare into your eyes
This sickness makes me weaker as each second flies.
I want to see you again
To hold you and ease of these pain
To see the smile that snuck into my heart
To hear the voice that comforts me when hurt
How I long to see you grin!
My arms are dying to touch your soft skin.
My sleep torments me like a windswept sea
Because you are all I can see
My nostrils remember your scent
The aura that followed you everywhere you went
The aura that earned everyone's trust
This aura has held me in the present and the past.

title: My Beautiful Flower
content:
I think of you every hour
My dear beautiful flower
I think daily of your beautiful smile
Of your teeth glittering like a white tile
I think of asking you for a date
I don't know if am already too late.
You always leave me in a glee
Like a caged bird that has been set free
You fill my lone dreams every night
But sad reality shatters me with the break of light
Even though it gives nice feeling to feel
It is just a dream and not real.
With your voluptuous nature
Makes you the most beautiful creature
A girl that everyone wants to have
A girl that I'll always secretly love
The girl who I have always loved to embrace
The girl I have loved for all her grace.

title: Though Separated
content:
Though separated by many miles
I remember our last few smiles
The last time we were in our 'highs'
The last seconds I was staring in your eyes
The last time I listened to you singing
I can still hear your voice's sweet ringing.
Though you are far away
Memories of you never slip away for a day
Though I may be quite strong
I haven't forgotten you for even this long
How can I even forget you?
If all I think of is you?
I see your face without strain
But still it fills me with pain
The thought of never getting another chance
If only you could even give me a glance
I would stick by you forever
I mean forever and ever.

title: More Than Adore
content:
Maybe I always loved you
From the days that I was a prince to you
The days when I dreamt of you
All the times I walked beside you
The times you acknowledged you loved me
The times you still smiled at me
The times I could still hold you
The times I still trusted you
The times you still trusted me
The times you stood by me
I miss those times
I miss the small mischievous crimes
Most of all I miss you
That was when I still loved you
Because now I more than adore you
Sad truth is that I will never have you.

title: A Leaden Heart
content:
I bear a leaden heart
A true testimony of being hurt
Someone who was to me dear and beloved
I will live forever a life that is starved
To lose a precious friend in life
It is like holding a handless blade of a knife
It will set a scar that one will never forget
No one will be crossing the boundary you set
No one is replacing your place my friend
I will remember you to my end.
You were to me more than a brother
I trusted you like I trusted no other
A friend who had earned all my trust
In the recent and even in my forgotten past
I will miss your encouraging words
Words that were obeyed by even the birds
You were simple, obedient and honest
Your goodness all but modest
Goodbye my eternal brother
I only wish we were born of the same mother.

title: No Cure for the Heart
content:
Too bad there is no cure for the heart
A heart in which once knew to flirt
In which all that grew has become lost
Hearts that have grown cold with frost
Hearts whose owners no longer yearn to live
Hearts that will never again learn to forgive.
The heart loves what the heart loves
When it's filled it only serves
It does not listen to any voice of reason
It is like a caged bird set free from its prison
It does not waste any chance to fly
It takes to the sky before every eye.
Like a lion robbed of its mane
Disastrous like the crashing of a plane
It is the feeling closest to being insane
Like fighting your reflection on a glass pane
It is like walking in hell alone
It is like your world is all suddenly gone.

title: No End to the Past
content:
I wish there was no end to the past
I wish it didn't have to end so fast
The past in which I had truly lived
I lived not survived and existed
That's when all my dreams were born
That was when my interests and passions were grown
That was when everyone would have earned my heart
Now I feel nothing but the pain of being hurt
The torture of sudden but expected separation
One that is never cured by even an ocean of preparation
The past that I can almost touch
The past that has left me with a burning patch
I guess life isn't just fair
How else could it let my heart face such a tear?
I guess life constantly decides to give me an eternal memory
Only that each memory leaves me more bitter and sorry
I wish the past was part of my tomorrow
Because I would have a chance to escape all these sorrow
My life after that would be sweet and slow
I would have nothing but joy to show.

title: I Won't Promise the Sky
content:
I won't promise to give you the sky
Because that would be a clean lie
I won't promise to make you fly
Because broken promises only make one cry
But I can promise that if you gave me your heart
I would try my best never to get you hurt.
I won't promise to deal with all your fears
But I can help to dry your tears
Though my wealth might amount to nothing
But I know that true love is truly something
I can give what most have failed to give
I will give you joy for as long as we live.
I'm happy you haven't left me all this time
Even when your beauty is at its prime
Even though I wasn't the best above the crust
You still gave me all your love and trust
I will hold you for as long as am able
I would hold you till forever if it was possible.

title: You Could Have Called
content:
You could have given me a call
I wouldn't have been blind to your signal
I would have stayed a little longer
I would have fought a little stronger
I would have given all I had to share
I would have always been there.
How should I have ever known?
If you were always away and gone
You never allowed me to get close
Now you can't shoulder to me this cross
You gave me the wrong information
I can't be loyal to an unknown nation.
How would I have known you loved me?
If your coldness is all I could see
You never gave me an ear to what I had to say
I'm sorry but it is too late today
You shielded me away day by day
Time has eroded those emotions away.

title: Dwelling in the Past
content:
I dwell in the past
A past in which I lived with trust
Now I am not sure I can do that
Because experience got me seriously hurt
I got dents in my once good character
Trust has become all but a forgotten character.
I am not sure I will ever regain that balance
I am unwilling to take my next chance
I love games and really enjoy playing
It is only too bad am the prey predators are preying
I don't want to ever trust
I don't want a repeat of the past.
Life is my biggest problem
It keeps on putting me to shame
Keeps on giving me a hard time
Keeps on leading me to more emotional crime
Maybe I should turn over a new page
My systems are just too afraid of such a change.

title: Under the Light of the Moon
content:
I hope to see you soon
Under the light of the moon
To see the person I'll walk down the aisle
To see the most beautiful smile
On which the moon always seems to shine.
You are everything I lack
The charm that gives me good luck
The drug that gives me peace
The power that draws me with every kiss
The aura that exists when you are around
Your aura spreads even to the ground.
I wish I could see you dance
While your waist is in my hands
I wish I was there when you slept
At least you wouldn't be alone when the night crept
I wish I could show you all my love
You are all I love and have.

title: Love Is Blind
content:
Maybe our love wasn't meant to be long lasting
Or you were just never worth trusting
It wasn't to die out like every other flame
But you made it a game all the same
You made me a faithful sheep
I believed you would never let a secret slip.
Maybe I should have read in between the lines
Maybe I should have been more careful for the signs
Signs of mismanaged trust
Signs that "we" were going to be the past
But everything was blind to my mind
No wonder they say love is blind.
You did it fast and swift
Created an eternal impervious rift
You did every wrong they said
What a lovely fool you made!
I won't avenge you for the lies you lied
Life will punish you for all the tears I shed.

title: My Morning Star
content:
You are my morning star
Perfect without a single scar
Born and bred in the depths of heaven
Would rate nine on a scale of one to seven
An angel in every sense
Calmness flows simply with her presence.
You are the master of my sky
You make my wild emotions fly
Whenever life becomes tough
You soften it with her laugh
Simply hearing you softly sing
Your voice assures me that am your king.
Even the stars speak of you
Credit must be given where it's due
You dazzle everyone with your smile
Your teeth arranged in a perfect file
Seeing you, my heart skips a beat
How your love raises me to a golden seat!

title: Footsteps in Your Heart
content:
You are the unforgettable part of my history
Maybe it's because of our little chemistry
Or maybe it was because you were unique
A queen that fell for no trick
A human so tender and loving
Your heart was always willing to be serving.
Some people always leave footsteps in your heart
You are the same kind who never gets others hurt
The few people who live forever in others
You treated everyone like your own brothers
You are the few that have golden hearts
You helped no matter how much it hurts.
You saw everything from the other person's eyes
You were never tempted to telling any lies
Never quick to anger
Never complained even when you were pushed by hunger
Too bad I couldn't save you from the grave
I don't think I'll meet anyone so brave.

title: My Heart Had No Choice
content:
From the first time we met, I felt we were bonded
Your beauty simply left me dumbfounded
Your voice was softer than velvet
Surely, angels worked extra hard to put you in my fate
Tall, beautiful and slender
My heart had no choice but to surrender.
You were standing right before me
The most beautiful thing I had ever lived to see
Standing tall and bold
Speaking only words that could equal to gold
Perfumed with the sweetest scent
Your attributes would have made every sinner repent.
By the reflection of your bright eyes
I could clearly see the blue skies
I could feel my heart beat fast
I was sure you were worthy of trust
You drew me close by an unknown force
The force keeps on drawing me closer to you.

title: How Do You Expect Me to Walk Away
content:
How do you expect me to walk away?
If I will miss you each and every single day
If I won't ever feel your soft skin
To know I will never see you again
That beautiful smile
We are distanced by mile after mile.
What would I do without you by my side?
You are the crown that gives me pride
You will walk away with my feeble heart
I will live each day afterward in a world of hurt
Knowing that you will go with a piece of me
A part of my heart can feel or see.
Losing you is like signing to be insane
Each second without you is a world of pain
Each minute without you draws me closer to death
Without you I become poor even with wealth
My heart without you only lives to yearn
My life without you is simply life without fun.

title: Too Late to Resume
content:
It is too late to resume our story
Should have listened when I said I was sorry
It is too late to give me that sparkling smile
We are separated by more than a mile
Don't brighten those beautiful brown eyes
At least they should have told truths from lies
They were ice cold when you called me a liar
You should have been merciful before setting me on fire.
Someone else welded together what you had broken
Someone warmed what you had frozen
Someone else believed in me
Someone else saw what you couldn't see
Someone else gladly took your place
Someone with a more beautiful face
Someone who always trusts whatever I say
She stayed by me even on my darkest day.

title: No One Can Be Trusted
content:
I don't know who to trust
Hunted by my dark past
A doctor who cures almost all
Yet I cannot prevent my free fall
I'm probably falling to my death
I find no security in my wealth
I trusted the dark and beautiful world
But they reduced me to nothing but a child
Proved once and for all no one can be trusted
Even my true love never lasted
Once again I walked away with a broken heart
Once again I am evenly hurt
My skills push me closer to my death
I am weak even with intellectual strength
I can get others to reach to the sky
Yet my own abilities can't make me fly
Yet I am always getting hurt
I help others cure the diseases of the heart.

title: Only Your Memory Persists
content:
My closed eyes see your face
Emptiness is all left in your place
A reality so true
Like walking without feet
It's all like hot water without heat.
Left me like a log
Am no different from the dead in the morgue
Everything else in my life exists
Only your memory lives and persists
I drift through the real reality
I live in memories that will fulfill at infinity.
You have pumped through my every vein
Carried you forward in torture and pain
The pain of touching nothing
The misery of ending without anything
You stripped my heart bare
You left after a short flare.

title: Memories Don't Change
content:
Am not really sure who to trust
Not sure whether to trust the future or the past
The past that is so painful
Or the future that seems so hopeful
It seems all too strange
Even if people change, memories don't really change.
Some things haven't really changed though
Your eyes still bear the spark I used to know
Your smile keeps me gazing
My God! You are still amazing
It is like seeing you for the first time
You are a beauty still shining its prime.
Sadly all good things are dangerous and wild
And you were the most beautiful one in the world
You broke my heart gently
Knew the wounds would heal eventually
But still breaking up really got me hurt
You knew time would heal my heart.
Now you say you are all mine
The golden star on your Christmas pine
You know I still held on to that love
But you are too good to have
It's not you that I don't trust
It is your behavior in the past.

title: Friendly Wounds
content:
I have learnt foreign wounds heal fast
Heal fast because they don't get to your heart
Foreign wounds heal to a scar or a scald
Friendly wounds are recalled even if they don't leave you bald
Friendly wounds burn and pierce you inside out
It is so painful that no one has ever healed the heart.
Friendly wounds avail more than pain
Enough pain to drive you insane
Beautiful as relationships are
They rip from the bone to the fur
One moment it is the entire universe's magic
The next thing you know, it is all tragic.
Please don't fall in love for your own sake
Fall in love if you can bear heartbreak
Love is the most beautiful sharable bond
But sometimes it is just an image of a golden frond
Just too many have had their illusion
Others have just admitted it was all a bad intrusion.

title: My Sweet Deadly Poison
content:
Don't pretend you are truly sorry
Am too old to fall for the same story
Surely even if I had a heart of steel
Not all my wounds will eventually heal
Am not sure which is more painful
The pain of your rejection yesterday
Or the pain caused by your presence each day
It is not that I hate your presence
In fact I love it in every sense
It is just that I know you weren't meant to be mine
Our love is like a star that will never shine
My eyes can almost touch it
But nowhere in the reach of my physical or emotional feet
You and I were supposed to walk the aisle
Yet you broke my heart with a smile
Tell me where does this happen on earth?
My sweet deadly poison
You say you are in love with me
But somehow you are convinced this love is not to be
You should have remained blind
And my emotions should have remained in my mind
Who could have blamed you?
The world revolved all around you
Even though you didn't try
You were in everyone's eye
My eyes were not a special case
I can all too clearly remember your face
You were the angel everyone wanted to hold
But your character wouldn't let any of that unfold
You were just all too beautiful
So beautiful that you made everyone fearful
Your voice was velvet soft
So soft that it gave me emotional comfort
You seemed so fragile
Your face always held up in a smile
You were my best friend
You knew I loved you from the beginning to the end
We seemed like we were from different worlds
But all that kept us apart was my words
I was weak
Too afraid to speak
Courage just left
And I never said what I truly felt
I was always left staring into your eyes
Eyes sparkling with anticipation like crystals of ice
I was guilty for many crimes
You caught me gazing and staring too many times
I had to tell you someday
And that was the day
Your answer made my being smile
My heart must have ran a mile
All I had hoped for
And all loving hearts wish to know
The heart bears a connection
The other heart cares with the same affection
You did the unthinkable
You burst my bubble
You were madly in love with me
Yet our love just couldn't be
I wonder what you mean by that
But you had dented my heart with that
My God why are beautiful things so complex and dangerous?
I should have never pictured any kind of us.
